---
title: "Nonindicated Prescriptions and Diagnostic Imprecision (Table 4, Table S8)"
author: "Till Julius Adam"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(writexl)
library(glue)
library(broom)
```

```{r load-data}
data <- read_excel("data_simulated.xlsx")
data <- data[data$ExamType == 1, ]
factor_cols <- c( "sex", "race", "AdoptedPatient", "Siblings", "Family_History_Any", "Smoking", "Antipsychotic_discharge", "Antidepressant_discharge", "Mood_Stabilizer_discharge", "Anxiolytic_Hypnotic_discharge", "Stimulant_discharge", "R_AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder", "R_SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder", "R_BipolarAndRelatedDisorder", "R_DepressiveDisorder", "R_AnxietyDisorder", "R_ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders", "R_TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder", "R_FeedingAndEatingDisorders", "R_DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders", "R_SubstanceAbuse", "R_PersonalityDisorder", "Ch_AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder", "Ch_SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder", "Ch_BipolarAndRelatedDisorder", "Ch_DepressiveDisorder", "Ch_AnxietyDisorder", "Ch_ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders", "Ch_TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder", "Ch_FeedingAndEatingDisorders", "Ch_DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders", "Ch_SubstanceAbuse", "Ch_PersonalityDisorder" )
data[factor_cols] <- lapply(data[factor_cols], as.factor)
```

```{r table-4-nonindicated}
# === CONFIGURATION ===
predictor_type <- "FPvTNFN"  # Options: "FPvTN" or "FPvTNFN"

# === DEFINITIONS ===
disorders <- c(
  "AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder",
  "SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder",
  "BipolarAndRelatedDisorder",
  "DepressiveDisorder",
  "DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders",
  "AnxietyDisorder",
  "ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders",
  "TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder"
)

drug_classes <- c("Antipsychotic", "Antidepressant", "Mood_Stabilizer", "Stimulant", "Anxiolytic_Hypnotic")

# === MAIN LOOP: COLLECT RAW RESULTS ===
raw_results <- data.frame(
  disorder = character(),
  drug_class = character(),
  or = numeric(),
  ci_low = numeric(),
  ci_high = numeric(),
  p = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (i in seq_along(disorders)) {
  pred_col <- paste0(predictor_type, "_", disorders[i])

  for (j in seq_along(drug_classes)) {
    outcome_col <- paste0("nonindicated_", drug_classes[j], "_discharge")

    df <- data[!is.na(data[[pred_col]]) & !is.na(data[[outcome_col]]), ]

    row <- data.frame(
      disorder = disorders[i],
      drug_class = drug_classes[j],
      or = NA_real_, ci_low = NA_real_, ci_high = NA_real_, p = NA_real_
    )

    if (nrow(df) >= 10 && length(unique(df[[pred_col]])) >= 2) {
      tryCatch({
        model <- glm(reformulate(c(pred_col, "sex", "Age", "race"), outcome_col),
                     data = df, family = binomial)
        sm <- summary(model)$coefficients
        if (pred_col %in% rownames(sm)) {
          est <- sm[pred_col, "Estimate"]
          se <- sm[pred_col, "Std. Error"]
          row$or <- exp(est)
          row$ci_low <- exp(est - 1.96 * se)
          row$ci_high <- exp(est + 1.96 * se)
          row$p <- sm[pred_col, "Pr(>|z|)"]
        }
      }, error = function(e) {})
    }

    raw_results <- rbind(raw_results, row)
  }
}

# === FDR CORRECTION ===
raw_results$p_fdr <- p.adjust(raw_results$p, method = "BH")

# === FORMAT FUNCTIONS ===
format_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return("—")
  if (p < 0.0001) return("<0.0001")
  sprintf("%.4f", p)
}

format_or_ci <- function(or, ci_low, ci_high) {
  if (is.na(or)) return("—")
  sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", or, ci_low, ci_high)
}

# === BUILD OUTPUT MATRIX ===
row_names <- as.vector(rbind(
  paste0(drug_classes, "_OR"),
  paste0(drug_classes, "_p")
))

results <- matrix(NA_character_, nrow = length(drug_classes) * 2, ncol = length(disorders),
                  dimnames = list(row_names, disorders))

for (k in seq_len(nrow(raw_results))) {
  i <- match(raw_results$disorder[k], disorders)
  j <- match(raw_results$drug_class[k], drug_classes)

  results[(j - 1) * 2 + 1, i] <- format_or_ci(raw_results$or[k], raw_results$ci_low[k], raw_results$ci_high[k])
  results[(j - 1) * 2 + 2, i] <- format_p(raw_results$p_fdr[k])
}

# === EXPORT ===
results_df <- data.frame(Metric = rownames(results), results, row.names = NULL, check.names = FALSE)
write_xlsx(results_df, paste0("Table_4_Nonindicated_", predictor_type, "_FDR.xlsx"))
```

```{r underdiagnosis-schizophrenia-antipsychotics}
pred_col <- "FNvTPTN_SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder"
outcome_col <- "Antipsychotic_discharge"
censor_col <- "censor_underdx_Antipsychotic_discharge"

df_under_all <- data[
  !is.na(data[[pred_col]]) &
  !is.na(data[[outcome_col]]) &
  !is.na(data[[censor_col]]),
]
df_under <- df_under_all[df_under_all[[censor_col]] == 0, ]
df_under[[pred_col]] <- factor(df_under[[pred_col]], levels = c(0, 1))

model_under <- glm(
  reformulate(c(pred_col, "sex", "Age", "race"), outcome_col),
  data = df_under, family = binomial
)
summary(model_under)
```

```{r table-s8-prescriptions-discordant}
# === Table S8: Medication frequencies in FP and FN patients per disorder ===

# Individual drug discharge columns
drug_cols <- c(
  "Aripiprazole_discharge", "Risperidone_discharge", "Quetiapine_discharge",
  "Ziprasidone_discharge", "Paliperidone_discharge", "Chlorpromazine_discharge",
  "Olanzapine_discharge", "Latuda_discharge",
  "Citalopram_discharge", "Escitalopram_discharge", "Fluoxetine_discharge",
  "Venlafaxine_discharge", "Cymbalta_discharge", "Bupropion_discharge",
  "Sertraline_discharge", "Elavil_discharge", "Paroxetine_discharge",
  "Amitriptyline_discharge", "Mirtazapine_discharge", "Pristiq_discharge",
  "Luvox_discharge", "Nortriptyline_discharge", "Trazodone_discharge",
  "Lithium_discharge", "Lamotrigine_discharge", "Depakote_discharge",
  "Divalproex Sodium Er_discharge",
  "Lorazepam_discharge", "Clonazepam_discharge", "Diphenhydramine_discharge",
  "Hydroxyzine_discharge", "Buspar_discharge", "Melatonin_discharge",
  "Concerta_discharge", "Adderall_discharge", "Focalin_discharge",
  "Vyvanse_discharge", "Strattera_discharge", "Guanfacine HC_discharge",
  "Clonidine_discharge"
)

# Keep only drug columns that exist in the data
drug_cols <- drug_cols[drug_cols %in% names(data)]

table_s8 <- data.frame(
  Disorder = character(),
  DiagnosticStatus = character(),
  Drug = character(),
  N = integer(),
  Pct = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (disorder in disorders) {
  sdm_col <- paste0("SDM_", disorder)
  if (!sdm_col %in% names(data)) next

  for (status in c("FP", "FN")) {
    subset_df <- data[data[[sdm_col]] == status, ]
    n_group <- nrow(subset_df)
    if (n_group == 0) next

    for (drug in drug_cols) {
      n_on <- sum(subset_df[[drug]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
      if (n_on == 0) next
      table_s8 <- rbind(table_s8, data.frame(
        Disorder = disorder,
        DiagnosticStatus = status,
        Drug = sub("_discharge$", "", drug),
        N = n_on,
        Pct = round(100 * n_on / n_group, 1),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

table_s8
```
